 FUNCTION right(array, time)
  right_list ← []

  count ← 0

  row ← Split input by space and convert each element to integer
  Add row to matrix

 primary_sum ← 0
 For each row in matrix do
  primary_sum ← primary_sum + row[index of row in matrix]
 End For
 
 secondary_sum ← 0
 For each row in matrix do
  secondary_sum ← secondary_sum + row[-index of row in matrix - 1]

  Print primary_sum - secondary_sum
 Else

FUNCTION main()
  n ← Input integer
  matrix ← Empty list
  
  FOR i FROM 1 to n DO
  row ← Split input by space
  Convert each element of row to integer
  Append row to matrix
  
  primary_sum ← 0
  FOR row IN matrix DO
  index ← Index of row in matrix
  Add row[index] to primary_sum
  
  secondary_sum ← 0
  FOR row IN matrix DO
  index ← Index of row in matrix
  Add row[-index-1] to secondary_sum
  
  IF primary_sum > secondary_sum THEN
  Print primary_sum - secondary_sum
  ELSE
  Print secondary_sum - primary_sum
 END FUNCTION

FUNCTION calculate_diagonal_difference()
  degree ← Input an integer
  matrix ← []
  
  FOR i FROM 1 to degree DO
  row_input ← Input a line of space-separated integers
  row ← Convert row_input into a list of integers
  Add row to matrix
  
  prid ← 0
  secd ← 0
  index ← 0
  
  FOR row IN matrix DO
  prid ← prid + row[index]
  index ← index + 1
  
  index ← -1
  
  FOR row IN matrix DO
  secd ← secd + row[index]
  index ← index - 1
  
  Print AbsoluteValue(prid - secd)
 END FUNCTION

FUNCTION calculateDiagonalDifference()
  size ← Input()
  matrix ← []
  FOR i FROM 1 to size DO
  row ← Input().strip().split()
  Add row to matrix
  END FOR
  
  sum_of_primary_diagonal ← 0
  sum_of_secondary_diagonal ← 0
  
  FOR i FROM 1 to size DO
  sum_of_primary_diagonal ← sum_of_primary_diagonal + matrix[i][i]
  sum_of_secondary_diagonal ← sum_of_secondary_diagonal + matrix[size-i][size-i]
  END FOR
  
  difference ← sum_of_primary_diagonal - sum_of_secondary_diagonal
  
  IF difference â‰ 0 THEN
  Output("The diagonals are not equal.")
  ELSE
  Output("The diagonals are equal.")
  END IF
  
  RETURN difference
 END FUNCTION

 FUNCTION CalculateDiagonals(matrix, k)
  diagonal1 ← 0
  diagonal2 ← 0
  FOR i FROM 0 to k - 1 DO
  diagonal1 ← diagonal1 + matrix[i][i]
  diagonal2 ← diagonal2 + matrix[i][k - i - 1]
